response.justification: While Bogdan is a talented and accomplished software engineer with 16+ years of experience, this role requires deep C++ expertise on Windows platforms with financial services domain knowledge. His background is primarily in web development, mobile applications, and open source systems—with only ~6 months of C++ experience from 2014-2015 and zero exposure to Fixed Income, capital markets, or banking domains. The technical and domain mismatch is substantial.
strengths: Strong general software engineering foundation across multiple languages and architectural patterns
Demonstrated ability to master new technical domains (GIS platforms, direct mail automation, investment optimization)
Excellent communication and knowledge-sharing skills with public speaking and mentorship experience
concerns: Insufficient C++ depth and recency—only ~6 months of professional experience from 2014-15, not the required 5-10 years
Complete absence of financial services, Fixed Income, or capital markets domain knowledge
No Windows platform or SQL Server/Oracle database experience in any professional context
